privileged_info_summary: The Odoo Scheduling environment uses Odoo 17 with PostgreSQL 15, accessed at http://localhost:8069 with admin credentials (admin/admin). The database is named 'odoo_scheduling' with calendar and contacts modules installed. Test data includes 12 synthetic contacts with @northbridge.org email domain, including Grace Patel (CFO) and Henry Kim (VP Operations), plus 21 pre-created calendar events. Key discrepancy: Comments in setup_data.py claim 8 contacts, 15 events, and Alice Johnson appearing in 5 events, but actual code creates 12 contacts, 21 events, and Alice Johnson appears in 9 events.
